Zanesville Ohio's Premier Paving Contractor

Transforming Zanesville Properties with Expert Paving Solutions

For over 26 years, Neff Paving has been the trusted choice for property owners throughout Zanesville and the surrounding areas who demand excellence in every project. As a two-time Top Paving Contractor in the country, we outpace the competition and deliver quality asphalt services at lower costs. From residential driveways that enhance curb appeal to large-scale commercial installations in the Zanesville area, we bring unmatched expertise, premium materials, and personalized service to every job.

Quality Guaranteed

Premium materials, advanced equipment, and skilled craftsmen ensure your Zanesville project exceeds expectations.

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed and insured, with workers' compensation and state contractor licensing for your peace of mind.

Fast Response

Instant estimates, online contract enrollment, secure Stripe payments, and flexible scheduling for Zanesville area customers.
